'''wazhafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mhometer|mhometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mhometer|mhometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wazhafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzhæfæth|wæzhæfæth]] || [[word:wæzhæfæj|wæzhæfæj]] || [[word:wæzhæfæsh|wæzhæfæsh]] || [[word:wæzhæfæ|wæzhæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazhazhafath|wazhazhafath]] || [[word:wazhazhafaj|wazhazhafaj]] || [[word:wazhazhafash|wazhazhafash]] || [[word:wazhazhafa|wazhazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazhafath|wazhafath]] || [[word:wazhafaj|wazhafaj]] || [[word:wazhafash|wazhafash]] || [[word:wazhafa|wazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazhaffath|wazhaffath]] || [[word:wazhaffaj|wazhaffaj]] || [[word:wazhaffash|wazhaffash]] || [[word:wazhaffaf|wazhaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazhafatha|wazhafatha]] || [[word:wazhafaja|wazhafaja]] || [[word:wazhafasha|wazhafasha]] || [[word:wazhafaka|wazhafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazhafath|wazhafath]] || [[word:wazhafaj|wazhafaj]] || [[word:wazhafash|wazhafash]] || [[word:wazhafa|wazhafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazhafathal|wazhafathal]] || [[word:wazhafajal|wazhafajal]] || [[word:wazhafashal|wazhafashal]] || [[word:wazhafakal|wazhafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazhafathatha|wazhafathatha]] || [[word:wazhafajaja|wazhafajaja]] || [[word:wazhafashasha|wazhafashasha]] || [[word:wazhafaka|wazhafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazhafathan|wazhafathan]] || [[word:wazhafajan|wazhafajan]] || [[word:wazhafashan|wazhafashan]] || [[word:wazhafakan|wazhafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazhafathaoro|wazhafathaoro]] || [[word:wazhafajaoro|wazhafajaoro]] || [[word:wazhafashaoro|wazhafashaoro]] || [[word:wazhafakaoro|wazhafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
